# GreenEdge
> Adelaide gardening & landscaping, done sharp.
Local, owner-operated gardening and landscaping across Adelaide.

## About
GreenEdge is an Adelaide gardening and landscaping business built on a simple idea — your garden should look sharp, year-round, without you having to think about it.
We started because we got tired of how most garden services run: vans full of subcontractors, jobs squeezed into impossible schedules, lawns half-mowed and hedges half-trimmed. We do it differently — small team, full attention, real care for the gardens we look after.
Whether you need weekly mowing, a full landscape redesign, or just someone reliable to keep your hedges in line, we'd love to help.

## Services
- **Lawn Care & Mowing** — Regular mowing, edging, and lawn health. Weekly, fortnightly, or one-off.
- **Hedging & Pruning** — Sharp lines on hedges, ornamentals, fruit trees, and feature shrubs.
- **Garden Maintenance** — Weeding, mulching, fertilising, and seasonal clean-ups. Keeps things sharp year-round.
- **Garden Design & Makeovers** — Refresh tired beds or start from scratch. Practical, low-maintenance designs that suit your block.
- **Landscaping** — Paving, retaining walls, garden beds, turf, decking. Built to last.
- **Irrigation & Drainage** — New systems, repairs, smart controllers. Save water, keep things green.

## Service Areas
Adelaide CBD, North Adelaide, Walkerville, Prospect, Norwood, Stepney, Kensington, Burnside, Glenside, Toorak Gardens, Unley, Hyde Park, Parkside, Fullarton, Mitcham, Hawthorn, Glenelg, Brighton, Henley Beach, West Lakes

## Credentials & Trust
- Fully insured
- Licensed in SA
- Police checked
- Free quotes
- SA Landscaping Licence (TODO: add real licence number)

## Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: Do you provide free quotes?**
A: Yes. We come out, walk the garden with you, and send a written quote within 48 hours. No obligation.

**Q: What suburbs do you service?**
A: Adelaide CBD and most metro suburbs out to roughly 25km from the city. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just call — we usually can.

**Q: Do you do one-off jobs or only regular maintenance?**
A: Both. One-off clean-ups, pre-sale tidy-ups, hedge resets, and full landscaping projects are all welcome alongside our ongoing maintenance plans.

**Q: Are you insured and licensed?**
A: Yes. Full public liability insurance and an SA landscaping licence. Certificates available on request.

**Q: What's included in a regular maintenance visit?**
A: Mowing, edging, hedging, weeding, blow-down, and green-waste removal. Specifics depend on your plan — we'll talk through what your garden needs during the quote.

**Q: Do you bring your own equipment?**
A: Yes. Mowers, edgers, blowers, hand tools — all our own, well-maintained, and ready to go.

**Q: What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?**
A: We reschedule within the week. No charge for weather-related changes.

**Q: Do I need to be home?**
A: Not unless you want to be. Most clients leave a side gate open or give us a code. We'll send a photo when we're done.

**Q: Do you remove the green waste?**
A: Yes. It all goes in the trailer and gets composted properly.

**Q: How does payment work?**
A: Invoice after the job, payable by bank transfer or card. No deposits required for maintenance work. Landscaping projects work on staged payments — we'll outline this in the quote.
